About Us  
Our Charity  
User account menu
Donate
Career and Volunteer Opportunities
Igniting the potential of people in your community.

When you join our team, you're not just getting a job – you are part of something bigger. Our staff are the spark that makes our charity’s impact possible. Simply put, a career at the Y is a career with a purpose. 

Inspired? Join our team!

The Y offers competitive wage and benefit packages including:
Free Y membership.
Discounted Y program fees (including health & fitness programs, child care and camps).
Extended Maternity leave benefits to all our staff up to 6 more months after the year of leave.
Development courses at no cost in several areas, as well as 100% coverage for renewal of professional designations.
Up to 27 vacation days per year, including two float days and one birthday vacation for full-time, permanent staff.
Access to an Employee Assistance Program
Health and dental insurance for full-time, permanent employees.
Short-term disability for all staff; long-term disability and life insurance for full-time, permanent employees.
Workplace pension plan available for full-time, permanent employees

No matter what role you seek, you can make a valuable contribution and help transform the lives of others. Simply put, a career at the Y is a career with a purpose. If you’re the kind of person that puts people
